desc: Places a Dimension between the edge of a source element and the centreline reference of a target Wall, in the active plan view.
summary: Places a Dimension between the edge of a source element and the centreline reference of a target Wall, in the active plan view. Pure-logic edge picking is delegated to GetElementEdges.
usecase: Architecture coordination тАФ engineer wants the distance from a door / window / grid / MEP-family to a named wall, dimensioned to drawing standards.
notfor: Face-to-face dimensions (use `ArchitectureDimensionFromElementFaceToWallFaceCommand` when built). Not for 3D views.
precondition: Active document open; active view is a ViewPlan; selection contains one source element + one Wall, or both IDs supplied via resolvers.
postcondition: Exactly one new Dimension added to the active view, inside a single committed Transaction, audit trail recorded.
logictree: 1) User or Bot picks source element + wall (resolvers: Resolver_SourceElementId, Resolver_WallId, Resolver_OffsetMm default=300). 2) Validate preconditions тАФ Active view is ViewPlan; source element and wall exist in Doc; wall has a linear LocationCurve; else ErrorWire.WireError with reason and abort. 3) Open Transaction "Dim edge тЖТ wall". 4) Call GetElementEdges.GetReferencesForDimension(Doc, [source, wall]) to obtain ReferenceArray; if count < 2 WireError + abort. 5) Compute the dimension line: midpoint between source BB centre and wall centreline, offset perpendicular to the wall centreline by Resolver_OffsetMm. 6) doc.Create.NewDimension(activeView, dimLine, refArray); commit Transaction. 7) Bot: return JSON {ok, dimension_id, value_mm, source_element_id, wall_id, view_id}. User: ribbon toast "Dimension placed тАФ {value_mm} mm." 8) Any exception during resolving / computing / creating тЖТ tracker.Fail(ex); ErrorWire.WireFault with structured payload {source_id, wall_id, view_id, offset_mm}. Transaction rolls back.

preprompts: Placing dimension from selected element edge to wallтАж
thinkingsteps: Placing Dimension in active plan viewтАж
successprompts: Dimension placed тАФ {value_mm} mm between element {source_id} and wall {wall_id}.
